cherise_dnd.message: Missed you at the comic con last week. We’re planning a meetup at the zombie walk, if you’re feeling better. No pressure but it’ll be good for you to get out of the house I think.
Hey. How have you been? I’m here if you wanna talk.

I don’t know what to say. It doesn’t feel real. A few days ago I was donating coins for Jo to get her stupid fluffy dress. I had no idea she’d never see it. I won’t tell the others if you don’t want me to. But we’re here for you. We may not know you in person, but a part of Jo will live in each of us forever.

Sorry. I know I should’ve told you right away, but for a long time I couldn’t talk about it. Jo is gone, Cherise. We were at a party. She wasn’t feeling good. I don’t know if it was on purpose, and it doesn’t really matter. Life hasn’t been the same without her. And I couldn’t go back to the game like nothing happened. But I can’t let go either. This was a big part of our friendship, so… Here I am, trying to move on. Failing miserably.
So, no pressure at all but Cherry has been text-bombing me since her bday about you two. Is everything ok?.
Hey stranger. Is it just me or the game is taking away my EXP? It’s like every time I connect, every one or two months, I’m way behind.

fairylady_003.message: Awwwe. Are the lizards limited edition? Reach out if you wanna trade.

cherrypoptart.message: Wow. That's dark. Even for you. You don’t joke about that. I’m sorry guys but I’ll have to block you?
Cherry, it’s totally my fault for not telling you before, but Jo is dead. Idk what’s going on but it can’t be her
You guys don’t wanna talk to me ever again? Fine. But wtf?? Jo just DM me the most insulting message for NO REASON. What did I do to you two?
cherrypoptart.trigger: después de dar click al perfil de Jo

cherrypoptart.message: Hey. Are you ghosting me?? It was my bday last week. So you’d better be dead bro I won’t accept any other excuse.
You missed St. Patrick’s?? Dude, I don’t care if you two are in your finals, it’s lit the best event of the game!! Shame, shame, shame.
Hey!! It’s the final round of the Valentine’s special and Jo is three votes away from becoming Miss Fairytale. Here’s the link. Vote, vote, vote.

sing_the_blues.message: Betty Boobs?! Oh. My. God! Of course I remember. Jo won’t believe it when I tell her you reached out. How have you been?? It’s been, what? Ten years? We were so silly!!

Hey! Do you guys know each other outside the game? Were you neighbors or sg? I went to school with Jo, and I’m pretty sure I met you back then as well. I’m Betty. I have a vague memory of the three of us learning a JBros choreography at the park haha

carly_mcr.message: Hey! Could you vote for my friend jo_star for Miss Cozy Universe. We would really appreciate it xoxo

jo_star.message: No! Don’t you see the green dot on my profile? DUH. I’m onlineee
Jo? But… this is impossible. Is this an automatic message or-
jo_star.trigger: cuando el jugador da click a la notificación de mensaje nuevo

jo_star.message: Shit, huh? Some time ago, they would’ve banned you for that message. Good thing they’re more chill now they’re going down.
jo_star.trigger: cuando ve a la réplica de la amiga en el juego le aparece una nueva notificación

jo_star.message: Happy bday, girl. They say it gets better with time. Spoiler alert: they’re full of sh*t
You thought I’d forget, huh? Traditions are traditions. HB!
Happy birthday, Jo. We miss you.

It’s been a whole year, but it feels like it was yesterday. You’ll probably never read this, but this was your favorite game. Everytime I play, it brings me back to when your mom visited mine and you were forced to hang out with the game nerd. I wished I had told you that I loved you more often. I wish I could hug you one more time. I still hear your laugh when I close my eyes. I don’t know what I’ll do if it slowly fades away from my memory
